summary: The diff implements most of the required functionality across backend and frontend. The backend Motoko actor includes the required data models and CRUD functions. The frontend implements all required pages and components. However, several notable gaps exist: the NewsletterForm component explicitly does not call the backend subscribeNewsletter function (it simulates a subscription), stable persistence via preupgrade/postupgrade hooks is not visible in the truncated backend, and the EV vs Petrol comparison section and Featured Brands section on the homepage are not evidenced in the visible diff files.

missing_requirements.requirement: subscribeNewsletter backend call from the NewsletterForm component — the form simulates subscription locally instead of calling the canister function
missing_requirements.reason: frontend/src/components/NewsletterForm.tsx explicitly comments 'subscribeNewsletter is not available in the backend interface' and uses a setTimeout simulation instead of calling the backend

missing_requirements.requirement: All Car and NewsArticle records persist across canister upgrades via stable variables or preupgrade/postupgrade hooks
missing_requirements.reason: The backend uses Map.empty() with no visible preupgrade/postupgrade hooks in the truncated file; stable persistence is not confirmed

missing_requirements.requirement: EV vs Petrol Comparison Highlights section on the homepage — a static visual callout comparing key attributes
missing_requirements.reason: No EVvsPetrolSection or equivalent component is visible among the added files in the diff

missing_requirements.requirement: Featured Brands section showing brand logos in a horizontal strip on the homepage
missing_requirements.reason: No FeaturedBrands component or section is visible among the added files in the diff

missing_requirements.requirement: Highlighted cells indicating which car wins on numeric attributes (price, speed, range/mileage) in the comparison table
missing_requirements.reason: The ComparisonPage file is listed as omitted due to limits and this acceptance criterion cannot be confirmed from available diff evidence
